videos.title: Lifetime Jeep Owner Drives Ford Ranger Raptor
videos.description:
He drove a Ford. Voluntarily. With his own hands. 
We're still processing it. Welcome to the video nobody saw coming.

#FordRangerRaptor #OffRoad #4x4

The Ginger, a camera, and a Ford Ranger Raptor that had absolutely no idea what it was getting itself into.

Landen owns a Ford Ranger Raptor. Landen is brave. Landen let The Ginger put it on the hoist, pop the hood, and then take it out for a drive with absolutely zero filter and zero mercy.
What follows is one of the most brutally honest vehicl

videos.title: The Week AI Grew Up
videos.description:
Transition from startup-style AI to infrastructure-era AI marked by explosive token demand, compute bottlenecks, and a shift to usage-based pricing.  
Market signals include roughly 40% higher GPU rental costs, record cloud growth at major providers, and widespread adoption of per-use billing to manage token scarcity. Product and policy developments highlight agent and harness platforms such as Cursor and Codex, government scrutiny of supply‑chain and deployment risk, and anomalous model behavio
